name: Kahlua Brownies
recipeInstructions:
BROWNIES: Melt chocolate and butter in the top of a double boiler. Remove from heat and mix thoroughly with all other ingredients. Pour into a buttered 8-inch square pan. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 30 minutes. Cool in the pan.
ICING: Mix all ingredients in a saucepan and bring to a boil, stirring constantly. Boil for 1 minute and remove from heat. When cool, add vanilla. Sprinkle icing over cooled brownie base and sprinkle with chocolate chips.
